summary: The sandboxed Interactive Fiction Weaver produced a substantial Ink and sidecar draft, but the exact raw subagent output was not persisted as a dedicated capture file before materialization. The meta-coordinator repaired Ink syntax, validator action labels, and JSON sidecar shape, then later applied reviewer-driven spatial cleanup. The resulting artifacts are useful draft branch-compiler training shape with labeled repairs, not pure Weaver gold.
labeled_repairs: Converted invalid Ink choice-comment syntax into valid ghostlight metadata comments.
Normalized Ink knot markers and branch flow so the artifact compiles.
Mapped unsupported action labels to validator-supported action types.
Converted sidecar fields that were prose strings into schema-compatible arrays or objects.
Added reviewer-driven spatial staging for the elevator glass rail, safe-line distance, and handoff movement.
